title: Better World Generation
description: This will make a better world generation! It adds new mobs, new biomes, improvements of structures, and way more!
body:
# 🌍 Better World Generation

## 📖 Overview
**Better World Generation** is a Minecraft `1.20.1` Forge modpack that transforms exploration and survival with fresh **biomes**, **improved structures**, and **immersive wildlife**.  

This pack focuses on:  
* 🌱 **Natural variety** — discover dozens of new biomes and landscapes  
* 🏞 **Adventure-ready terrain** — explore caves, mineshafts, and dungeons  
* 🐉 **Life-filled worlds** — encounter both mythical and natural creatures  

## ✨ Mods
* 🌍 [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith) – unique terrain and landscapes  
* 🌲 [Biomes O’ Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) – classic biome expansion  
* 🏗 [YUNG’s API](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-api) + [Better Mineshafts](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-mineshafts) – improved underground exploration  
* 🐉 [Ice and Fire: Dragons](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons) – mythical dragons and beasts  
* 🦊 [Alex’s Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs) – immersive wildlife and exotic creatures  
* 🧩 Citadel, GlitchCore, TerraBlender – essential libraries  

---

## 🔮 Roadmap
* Add more **YUNG’s structures**  
* Improve **performance & quality-of-life**  
* Optional datapacks for progression
